title: Quake+
description: Custom Railgun textures for the Hypixel game Quakecraft.
body:
![Quake+ Logo](https://yosho.nl/quakeplus/img/2.0/quake+_newlogo_banner.png)

> ⚠️ **This resource pack requires Optifine, CIT Resewn or Variants-CIT (5.x for latest versions).**
> If it still doesn't work for Optifine or CIT Resewn, turn on Custom Items (Video Settings > Quality)

**Quake+** is an overlay resource pack for the Hypixel game Quakecraft that adds a unique texture to each special railgun in the game. Some of these even have animations included with them. It also adds in unique textures for the Shop UI.

![All special railgun textures that Quake+ adds](https://i.imgur.com/m6nMjk2.gif)
